allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; "rustc: " + \(Get-Command rustc\).Source; "cargo: " + \(Get-Command cargo\).Source; "rustup: " + \(Get-Command rustup\).Source; "cargo home: $env:CARGO_HOME"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($root = "C:\\Users\\Master\\Desktop\\FrameWise - zenokid"; $dirs = @\(".github\\workflows","docs","assets","src\\platform","src\\overlay","src\\stats","src\\tray","src\\audit"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \(Join-Path $root $d\) | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory $root | Select-Object FullName)
